search_document:
User Request: Show quarterly sales.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Quarterly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Quarterly revenue trend
Title: Top Products by Sales
Type: table
Description: Products with the highest sales in the quarter
Title: Total Quarterly Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Total revenue generated in the quarter
Title: Sales by Region
Type: chart
Description: Revenue distribution across different regions
Title: Sales Growth Rate
Type: kpi
Description: Percentage growth in sales compared to the previous quarter

sql_queries.title: Quarterly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-Q%q', OrderDate) AS Quarter, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Quarter ORDER BY Quarter

sql_queries.title: Top Products by Sales
sql_queries.description: Products with the highest sales in the quarter
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM "Order Details" od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID JOIN Orders o ON od.OrderID = o.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', o.OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', date('now')) GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Quarterly Revenue
sql_queries.description: Total revenue generated in the quarter
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', o.OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', date('now'))

sql_queries.title: Sales by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipRegion, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', o.OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', date('now')) GROUP BY o.ShipRegion ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Sales Growth Rate
sql_queries.description: Percentage growth in sales compared to the previous quarter
sql_queries.sql: WITH CurrentQuarter AS (SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', o.OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', date('now'))), PreviousQuarter AS (SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y-Q%q', o.OrderDate) = strftime('%Y-Q%q', date('now', '-3 months'))) SELECT ((CurrentQuarter.Revenue - PreviousQuarter.Revenue) / PreviousQuarter.Revenue) * 100 AS GrowthRate FROM CurrentQuarter, PreviousQuarter
